audit_items.proof_trace: Area allocated via nfp_cpp_area_alloc() at line 800-801 but not freed when subsequent kzalloc() fails at line 806-807. Function returns -ENOMEM without calling nfp_cpp_area_free(area), creating resource leak.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Driver initialization under memory pressure causes kzalloc() to fail while area allocation succeeds, leaking allocated areas on each failure during nfp6000_init().
